data.body: HANDOFF (2026-07-08): OPEN, plan-review present. Not started. B1 = convergence rollout tail: baseline_consumer_swap flag (_config_schema), outbound_fields consumer -> get_baseline, run_differs census + classifier-vs-legacy alert, baseline_shadow divergence alerting. Includes LIVE shadow-pass validation + capped LIVE heal (user has authorized live runs). Note: main refactored run_differs into _run_differs_* helpers + _compute_outbound_update_mutation since this ticket was written — re-locate the seams. Verify: pytest tests/scripts/bridge/ -k direction_preservation (RED-first).
